Prompt
A massive, monolithic vertical cliffside megastructure, featuring a sheer rectangular planar facade with deep recessed vertical channels, intricate modular paneling, layered geometric protrusions, and sharp-angled structural indentations, towering over a coastal abyss, cyberpunk urban transformation, vibrant neon-drenched facade with pulsating magenta and acid-green holographic advertisements, dense light pollution reflected on rain-slicked wet cliff-edge walkways, heavy atmospheric fog and swirling mist, cinematic moody lighting, deep nocturnal shadows contrasting with blinding LED installations, chaotic information-dense urban landscape, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, futuristic brutalist architecture, complex industrial detailing, melancholic dystopian atmosphere, cinematic wide-angle composition, sharp focus, metallic textures illuminated by glowing data streams. --ar 9:16 --v 7 --stylize 900 --q 2
